subject: Fix the wrong MSB_PROTO env value
commit_message:
Fix the wrong MSB_PROTO env value

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-978
Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
Change-Id: I128421b36def6e974cde12093717cfe9e78b5b5f

Patch Set 1:

all multicloud pods are OK

1 issue with healthcheck on multicloud Titanium, got a 502 (expect 200)
possible side effect of the patch?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> all multicloud pods are OK
> 
> 1 issue with healthcheck on multicloud Titanium, got a 502 (expect 200)
> possible side effect of the patch?

not sure as we got the same behaviour on other gating (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/101179)
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux
